options.text: Surveys are boring to fill out.
Semi-structured interviews allowed us to explore participants' personal narratives in depth, which surveys couldn't capture.
We didn’t have time to design a good survey.

content.explanation: 正确答案清晰说明方法选择的学术依据——深度探索个人叙事。干扰项基于主观感受（opt_1）、能力不足（opt_3）或错误经济假设（opt_4），均未体现研究设计的合理性。
content.speakerText: Why did you choose semi-structured interviews over surveys for this study?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为什么为这项研究选择半结构化访谈而不是问卷调查？
